title: Build HTML scrubber utility for noise-free snapshots
description:
## GH: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/117

Create scrubHtml() utility that strips Svelte scoped class hashes, dynamic IDs, attribute ordering noise, timestamps. Use with toMatchFileSnapshot() for readable .html snapshot files.

**Depends on:** Vitest browser mode setup.
**Deliverable:** scrubHtml utility + custom matcher + example snapshot.
